text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world, such as photos and videos. Two key tasks in computer vision are image recognition, which identifies what is in an image, and object detection, which locates specific objects like cars or people. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, self-driving cars rely on computer vision to recognize traffic signs, detect pedestrians, and avoid obstacles in real time. Other uses include facial recognition in security systems and medical imaging to help doctors diagnose diseases. As technology improves, computer vision continues to make our lives safer and more efficient.
